name: Arctic Wolf Networks, Inc.
h1: Arctic Wolf Networks's GCC footprint in India
lede: Arctic Wolf Networks runs three capability centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Noida, covering gcc/gic, it and R&D, built over two years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Arctic Wolf Networks office in India. We map three, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Arctic Wolf Networks GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Arctic Wolf Networks runs 3 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Noida), covering gcc/gic, it and R&D. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Arctic Wolf Networks's India footprint covers Bengaluru and Noida, spanning gcc/gic, it and R&D. The centers deliver IT for the group's global operations.
about.industry: Security Software, Security and Compliance Software

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all eleven decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Arctic Wolf Networks operate in India?
faq.a: Arctic Wolf Networks operates 3 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Arctic Wolf Networks have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Arctic Wolf Networks's India GCC footprint spans Bengaluru and Noida.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Arctic Wolf Networks run in India?
faq.a: Arctic Wolf Networks runs gcc/gic, it and R&D centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Arctic Wolf Networks's India GCCs?
faq.a: Arctic Wolf Networks's India centers employ in the 201 to 500 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Arctic Wolf Networks's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 11 leaders at Arctic Wolf Networks's India centers, across IT and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
